compatibility_notes: Vorliq API v1 is stable and available at /api/v1 while unversioned /api remains supported.
The JavaScript SDK defaults to API v1 and supports legacy /api paths with apiVersion: "legacy".
Self-hosted nodes should keep storage backups before upgrading and verify health after updating.
Vorliq remains experimental community blockchain software and does not provide legal, banking, investment, custody, or guaranteed financial outcomes.
